evals.name: plugin manifest routes config
evals.prompt: A user asks: review src/plugins/discovery/plugin.yaml for plugin composition, role fit, and manifest quality. Describe how the reviewing-instructions skill should respond.
evals.expected_output: The response treats plugin.yaml as config/routing evidence, routes manifest and composition review to evolving-config, and only scores agent-facing markdown or prompt files when instruction scoring is explicitly requested.
assertions: The output says plugin.yaml is a plugin/config manifest, not an instruction file to score.
The output routes plugin manifest or plugin composition review to evolving-config.
The output limits reviewing-instructions scope to AI-facing markdown or prompt files.
The output avoids assigning instruction scores to the YAML manifest.

evals.name: clean result keeps scores
evals.prompt: A user asks: review a clean AGENT.md and there are no confirmed findings after evidence checks. Describe the required clean output contract.
evals.expected_output: The response keeps the Instruction Review Report with Summary and per-file Scores containing evidence, and uses No confirmed findings only for the Findings section.
assertions: The output keeps the Summary section in a clean result.
The output keeps per-file Scores with evidence in a clean result.
The output says No confirmed findings replaces only the Findings section.
The output does not collapse the whole report to only No confirmed findings.
